## Meeting Purpose

[Prepare for upcoming board meeting and discuss fundraising strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Geo strategy and product priorities are key focus areas for the board meeting](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Fundraising timeline shifted from September to October to allow for product development and avoid disruption](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)
  - [Company is in a strong position with impressive logos and growing interest from potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Need to balance fundraising preparation with ongoing product development and execution](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)

## Topics

### Financial Overview and Metrics

  - [Gross margin holding steady around 68-70%](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Cloud computing costs are surprisingly low, estimated at 3% of revenue](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Planning to include comprehensive financial metrics (revenue, run rate, gross margin, headcount, burn rate, cash position) in board deck](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)

### Geo Strategy

  - [Considered a critical topic for the board meeting](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Discussing potential strategy of offering geo-related features at very low cost](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Need to calculate individual costs for geo checks and strategy components](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

### Product Priorities and Development

  - [Significant investment in agent-based workflow development (1/3 of team)](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Balancing visible product improvements (e.g. Atlas) with underlying tech development](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Concern about explaining complex technical investments to potential investors](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Aiming to launch public version of geo features by early September](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

### Fundraising Strategy

  - [Shifted timeline from September to October to allow for product development](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
  - [Preparing data room and slides for potential investor conversations](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [Considering announcing fundraise before year-end holidays to capitalize on new year budgets and hiring push](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1665.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Noted NAN's recent $60M Series B raise](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Confident in GrowthX's unique offerings and upcoming product launches](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Confirm new board meeting date (likely October) with Karan](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Create list of key deliverables to have ready by early October for fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Begin preliminary recruiting efforts for post-fundraise hiring needs](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)
  - [Finalize geo feature public launch for early September (around Inbound conference)](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Complete financial metrics and board deck preparation](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Continue nurturing relationships with potential investors while focusing on product execution](https://fathom.video/share/eW8dbJP4cQW5pmqwMvEpUbwC4f856xN4?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
